glosses.ja: 震える; 身震いする

sentences.target: Je frémis en entendant ce bruit.

translations.fr: Je frémis en entendant ce bruit.
translations.es: Me estremezco al oír ese ruido.
translations.zh-Hans: 听到那个声音我就发抖。
translations.yue: 我聽到嗰個聲就打冷震。
translations.ru: Я вздрагиваю, когда слышу этот шум.
translations.pt: Eu estremeço ao ouvir esse barulho.
translations.he: אני מצטמרר כשאני שומע את הרעש הזה.
translations.vi: Tôi rùng mình khi nghe thấy tiếng động đó.
translations.nl: Ik huiver als ik dat geluid hoor.
translations.uk: Я здригуюся, коли чую цей шум.
translations.hu: Borzongok, amikor meghallom azt a zajt.
translations.hi: उस आवाज़ को सुनकर मैं काँप जाता हूँ.
translations.el: Τρέμω όταν ακούω αυτόν τον θόρυβο.
translations.nb: Jeg skjelver når jeg hører den lyden.
translations.id: Aku merinding saat mendengar suara itu.
translations.sv: Jag ryser när jag hör det där ljudet.
translations.ro: Mă cutremur când aud acel zgomot.
translations.cs: Třesu se, když slyším ten hluk.
translations.da: Jeg skælver, når jeg hører den lyd.
translations.ja: その音を聞くと震える。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb: present indicative, 1st person singular of 'frémir' (to shiver/tremble).
Preposition 'en' introducing a gerund (en + present participle) expressing manner/temporal overlap.
Present participle of 'entendre', used as a gerund complement to 'en'.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'bruit'.
Common noun; direct object of 'entendant' within the gerund phrase.

sentences.target: Elle frémit de froid sous la pluie.
sentences.reading: /ɛl fʁemi də fʁwa su la plɥi/

translations.fr: Elle frémit de froid sous la pluie.
translations.ipa: /ɛl fʁemi də fʁwa su la plɥi/
translations.en: She shivers from the cold in the rain.
translations.es: Ella tirita de frío bajo la lluvia.
translations.de: Sie zittert vor Kälte im Regen.
translations.it: Rabbrividisce dal freddo sotto la pioggia.
translations.ru: Она дрожит от холода под дождём.
translations.pt: Ela treme de frio na chuva.
translations.vi: Cô ấy run vì lạnh dưới mưa.
translations.ar: هي ترتجف من البرد تحت المطر.
translations.nl: Ze beeft van de kou in de regen.
translations.uk: Вона тремтить від холоду під дощем.
translations.hi: वह बारिश में ठंड से काँप रही है.
translations.pl: Ona drży z zimna w deszczu.
translations.el: Τρέμει από το κρύο στη βροχή.
translations.nb: Hun skjelver av kulde i regnet.
translations.id: Dia menggigil kedinginan di tengah hujan.
translations.sv: Hon huttrar av kyla i regnet.
translations.ro: Ea tremură de frig în ploaie.
translations.da: Hun skælver af kulde i regnen.
translations.ja: 雨の中で寒さに震えている。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine subject pronoun.
Main verb: present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition marking cause/source in 'de froid'.
Common noun 'cold' used as a complement of cause after 'de'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article agreeing with feminine singular 'pluie'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sous'.

sentences.target: Nous frémissons pendant le film d’horreur.

translations.fr: Nous frémissons pendant le film d’horreur.
translations.en: We shiver during the horror movie.
translations.es: Nos estremecemos durante la película de terror.
translations.ko: 공포 영화를 보는 동안 소름이 돋는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在看恐怖片时发抖。
translations.yue: 我哋睇恐怖片嗰陣會起雞皮。
translations.ru: Мы дрожим во время фильма ужасов.
translations.pt: Nós estremecemos durante o filme de terror.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi rùng mình khi xem phim kinh dị.
translations.uk: Ми тремтимо під час фільму жахів.
translations.hi: हम हॉरर फिल्म के दौरान काँपते हैं.
translations.el: Τρέμουμε κατά τη διάρκεια της ταινίας τρόμου.
translations.ro: Tremurăm în timpul filmului de groază.
translations.ja: ホラー映画を見ている間、震える。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb: present indicative, 1st person plural.
Preposition meaning 'during' introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article (masculine singular) for 'film'.
Common noun; head of the temporal complement.
Elided form of 'de' before a vowel sound; links 'film' to its genre.
Common noun; complement of 'de' forming 'film d’horreur'.

sentences.target: Ce vent fait frémir les feuilles.

translations.fr: Ce vent fait frémir les feuilles.
translations.en: This wind makes the leaves tremble.
translations.es: Este viento hace temblar las hojas.
translations.de: Dieser Wind lässt die Blätter zittern.
translations.it: Questo vento fa tremare le foglie.
translations.pt: Este vento faz as folhas tremer.
translations.vi: Cơn gió này làm lá cây rung lên.
translations.nl: Deze wind laat de bladeren trillen.
translations.hu: Ettől a széltől remegnek a levelek.
translations.hi: इस हवा से पत्ते कांपते हैं.
translations.pl: Ten wiatr sprawia, że liście drżą.
translations.el: Αυτός ο άνεμος κάνει τα φύλλα να τρέμουν.
translations.nb: Denne vinden får bladene til å skjelve.
translations.sv: Den här vinden får bladen att darra.
translations.ro: Vântul acesta face frunzele să tremure.
translations.da: Denne vind får bladene til at skælve.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying 'vent'.
Common noun; subject of 'fait'.
Main verb: present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'faire' in a causative construction.
Infinitive complement of 'faire' in a causative 'faire + infinitif'.
Definite article (plural) for 'feuilles'.
Common noun; object of 'faire' and semantic subject of the infinitive 'frémir'.
